2151370.name: AlphaBlue
2151370.description:
On an ancient planet, the battle android AB awakens from an immemorial slumber with a call: Destroy the villainy of the Pleiadians. Armed with ancester powers that allow her to manipulate the aether, she will face off against armies of enemies from all corners of the universe to achieve her goal.

AlphaBlue is a lateral shoot 'em up with retro-inspired graphics and music that blends classic elements of the genre into an adventure of progression and evolution.

Features

Campaign Mode - Discover AB's story in an adventure through more than 30 different stages, with many alternative paths. Get and evolve different weapons to fight the most diverse enemies and face unique battles against powerful bosses.

Infinite Mode - After completing Campaign Mode, put all your skills to the test in this endless mode that brings together all elements of the campaign in an endless challenge with unique enemies and bosses.

Difficulty Levels - Whether beginner or expert in the genre, find the ideal challenge for you among the 4 levels of difficulty available: Beginner, Adventurer, Challenging and Insane.

Online Leaderboard - Show your prowess to the world with the online leaderboard that displays the scores achieved in each level of Campaign Mode and Endless Mode.

Gallery - Enjoy the beautiful concept art, pixel art and unique music from the game through the Gallery.
2151370.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
